Label: GABA/Glu-localization selectivity
Description: Is selectively expressed in glutamatergic or GABAergic neurons?

Label: GABA/Glu-localization enrichment
Description: Is expressed more abundantly in glutamatergic or GABAergic neurons?

Label: GABA/Glu-function selectivity
Description: Belongs to the glutamatergic or GABAergic system?

Label: Pre/post-synaptic selectivity
Description: Is selectively expressed at pre- or postsynaptic terminals?

Label: Pre/post-synaptic enrichment
Description: Is expressed more abundantly in pre- or postsynaptic terminals?

Label: Neuron-enriched
Description: Is the expression enriched in neurons compared to glia?

Label: Synaptically enriched
Description: Within neurons, is mainly localized at synapses?

Label: Protein class
Description: Type of protein according to molecular function

Label: Main biological process
Description: Main biological function within the neuron

Label: Main subcellular localization
Description: Main subcellular localiization within the neuron
